name: trade-genius
description: Trade Genius — PWA + app Android (Capacitor) pédago bourse avec bulle native d'analyse de graphs.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run prepare-web && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:open: npm run prepare-web && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:run: npm run prepare-web && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:build: npm run prepare-web && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.cap:release: npm run prepare-web && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
